title: Aptech Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Aptech Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Aptech Advisory Limited in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Aptech Advisory Limited:
Aptech Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
